  - Eusebius Sophronius Hieronymus

---

One of the four great Latin Doctors of the Church. Best known for his translation of the Bible into Latin (the Vulgate).

## References in Commentary

- `source.html#section-one-p2` — "Ignorance of the Scriptures is ignorance of Christ"
  text: "Ignorance of the Scriptures is ignorance of Christ."
- `source.html#section-two-p3` — Called "the phoenix of his age"
  text: "St. Jerome, the phoenix of his age, who devoted himself entirely to sacred Letters"
